summary: Full e2e testing of GBA Emulator + Nuzlocke Tracker app. All backend APIs pass (12/12). All UI flows work correctly including home page, navigation, nuzlocke CRUD, encounter management.

issues: Minor: 'Play Any Game Boy Game Instantly' heading - 'Game Instantly' is emerald green, 'Play Any Game Boy' is white - looks intentional and clean

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 156 lines - well within size limit, no issues
All MongoDB queries use projection {_id: 0} - good practice
No input sanitization issues - Pydantic models handle validation
CORS middleware added after router - minor ordering concern but functional
seed_data_creation: Created test run 'Test Emerald Run' and encounter 'Treecko/Route 101' during testing. These may still exist in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional. Backend: all CRUD APIs for nuzlocke runs and encounters work. Frontend: home page, play page (no ROM state), nuzlocke list, create run modal, run detail page, add encounter modal, faint encounter, complete/fail run buttons all verified. EmulatorJS testing skipped (requires actual ROM file). The create run modal Game field is a text input with datalist (not select dropdown).
